top_signals.title: U.S. says capable of resuming war with Iran as deal remains elusive
top_signals.summary: The White House had signaled Trump was close to a decision on a potential deal, though Tehran denied there was a final agreement on ending the conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin’s biggest quantum risk may not be wallet keys. An early investor fears something bigger
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Naomi Osaka survives scare from Iva Jovic to reach fourth round in Paris
top_signals.summary: World No. 1 Aryna Sabalenka also won, beating Australia's Daria Kasatkina 6-0, 7-5, to set up a blockbuster clash against Osaka in the last-16.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
